templates.name: 個股基本面分析
templates.content: 請分析 {{股票代號}} ({{股票名稱}}) 的基本面，包含：近四季 EPS、本益比、股價淨值比、殖利率、營收年增率。給出投資建議與風險提示。

templates.name: 技術面快速掃描
templates.content: 請用技術分析觀點分析 {{股票代號}}，包含：目前均線排列（5/10/20/60 日線）、KD 與 RSI 指標、近期成交量變化、支撐與壓力價位。

templates.name: 同業比較
templates.content: 請比較 {{股票代號列表}} 這幾檔同業股票，從營收成長率、毛利率、本益比、殖利率等維度做表格比較，並指出各自優劣勢。

templates.name: 季報快速摘要
templates.content: 請解讀 {{公司名稱}} {{年度}}Q{{季度}} 財報重點，包含：營收、毛利率、營業利益率、EPS 與去年同期比較，並指出值得注意的異常項目。

templates.name: 現金流量分析
templates.content: 請分析 {{公司名稱}} 最近四季的現金流量表，說明營業、投資、籌資活動現金流的變化趨勢，判斷公司的資金健康度。

templates.name: 財報紅旗偵測
templates.content: 請檢查 {{公司名稱}} 最新財報是否有以下紅旗：應收帳款異常增加、存貨週轉天數拉長、負債比率飆升、業外損益佔比過高、現金流與獲利背離。

templates.name: 產業鏈分析
templates.content: 請分析 {{產業名稱}} 的上中下游產業鏈結構，列出各環節的代表性公司（台股為主），並說明目前產業景氣位階。

templates.name: 產業趨勢報告
templates.content: 請提供 {{產業名稱}} 的 2024-2025 年趨勢分析，包含：市場規模、成長驅動力、主要風險、受惠公司（台股），以及投資建議。

templates.name: ETF 成分股分析
templates.content: 請分析 {{ETF代號}} 的前十大成分股，說明各成分股的產業分布、權重、近期表現，並評估該 ETF 的投資價值。

templates.name: 電影級場景
templates.content: Generate a cinematic scene: {{場景描述}}. Style: {{風格}}, shot on 35mm film. Lighting: {{燈光}}. Camera angle: {{鏡頭角度}}. Color palette: {{色調}}. Ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, photorealistic.

templates.name: 人物肖像
templates.content: Create a {{風格}} portrait of {{人物描述}}. Expression: {{表情}}. Background: {{背景}}. Lighting: {{燈光}}. Art style: {{藝術風格}}. Highly detailed, professional quality.

templates.name: 產品展示圖
templates.content: Professional product photography of {{產品描述}}. Background: {{背景}}. Lighting: studio softbox, {{補充燈光}}. Angle: {{拍攝角度}}. Style: clean, commercial, magazine-quality. High resolution.

templates.name: Logo 與圖標設計
templates.content: Design a modern {{類型}} logo for {{品牌名稱}}. Concept: {{概念描述}}. Style: {{風格}}. Colors: {{配色}}. Must be clean, scalable, and work on both light and dark backgrounds. Minimalist, vector-style.

templates.name: 建築視覺化
templates.content: Architectural visualization: {{建築描述}}. Style: {{建築風格}}. Environment: {{環境}}. Time of day: {{時間}}. Materials: {{材質}}. Photorealistic rendering, award-winning architectural photography.

templates.name: 風格轉換
templates.content: Transform this image into {{目標風格}} style. Keep the original composition and subject matter. Apply {{藝術家或流派}} aesthetic. Adjust color palette to {{色調}}. Maintain structural integrity while fully adopting the new artistic style.

templates.name: 角色一致性續圖
templates.content: Generate the same character: {{角色描述}} (maintain exact appearance, clothing, and features). New scene: {{新場景}}. New pose: {{新姿勢}}. Same art style as reference. Ensure character consistency across images.

templates.name: 場景延伸
templates.content: Expand this scene outward. The original image shows: {{原圖描述}}. Extend the scene to reveal: {{延伸方向與內容}}. Maintain consistent lighting, perspective, style, and color palette with the original.

templates.name: Prompt 增強器
templates.content: 我有一個簡單的圖片生成描述：「{{原始描述}}」。請幫我擴充為專業的 AI 圖片生成 prompt，包含：1) 主體細節描述 2) 環境與背景 3) 燈光設定 4) 鏡頭與構圖 5) 藝術風格 6) 品質關鍵字。輸出英文 prompt，可直接用於 Grok Imagine / Gemini 圖片生成。

templates.name: 負面提示詞組合
templates.content: Negative prompt for high-quality generation: blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, disfigured, bad anatomy, wrong proportions, extra limbs, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, out of frame, duplicate, ugly, morbid, mutation. {{額外排除項目}}

templates.name: 電影短片分鏡
templates.content:
Create a cinematic storyboard for a {{時長}} short film about: {{主題}}.

For each shot provide:
- Shot number and duration (seconds)
- Camera movement (dolly/crane/tracking/static/handheld)
- Framing (wide/medium/close-up/extreme close-up)
- Scene description (action, subject, environment)
- Lighting mood
- Transition to next shot

Style reference: {{風格參考}}. Mood: {{氛圍}}. Aspect ratio: {{比例}}.

templates.name: 產品廣告腳本
templates.content:
Write a {{時長}} second product advertisement video script for {{產品名稱}}.

Provide frame-by-frame description:
- Seconds 0-3: Opening hook ({{開場方式}})
- Each subsequent 3-5 second segment: camera angle, product showcase, motion, text overlay
- Final 3 seconds: CTA and logo reveal

Tone: {{調性}}. Target audience: {{目標受眾}}. Key selling point: {{賣點}}.

templates.name: 動態 Logo Reveal
templates.content:
Create a {{時長}} second logo reveal animation for {{品牌名稱}}.

Logo description: {{Logo描述}}.
Animation style: {{動畫風格}}.
Background: {{背景}}.
Particle/effect type: {{特效類型}}.
Camera movement: start from {{起始}} smoothly transition to {{結束}}.
Sound design suggestion: {{音效建議}}.
Color scheme: {{配色}}.

templates.name: 靜態圖轉動態
templates.content:
Animate this still image: {{圖片描述}}.

Add the following motion:
- Camera: {{鏡頭運動}} (e.g., slow zoom in, pan left to right, parallax)
- Element animation: {{元素動態}} (e.g., hair flowing, clouds moving, water rippling)
- Duration: {{時長}} seconds
- Loop: {{是否循環}}
- Maintain the original art style and color palette.
- Subtle, natural movement — avoid distortion.

templates.name: 多圖過場動畫
templates.content:
Create a {{總時長}} second video transitioning through {{圖片數量}} images.

Image descriptions (in order):
{{圖片描述清單}}

Transition style between each: {{轉場效果}} (e.g., cross-dissolve, morph, whip pan, match cut).
Pacing: {{節奏}} (slow/medium/fast).
Background music suggestion: {{配樂風格}}.
Each image holds for {{每張秒數}} seconds.
Overall mood: {{整體氛圍}}.

templates.name: 角色動態化
templates.content:
Animate this character: {{角色描述}}.

Action: {{動作描述}} (e.g., walking forward, turning head, waving, speaking).
Expression change: {{表情變化}}.
Camera angle: {{鏡頭角度}}.
Background: {{背景}} (static or also animated).
Duration: {{時長}} seconds.
Style: maintain consistency with the reference image.
Smooth motion, natural body mechanics.

templates.name: 運鏡指令速查
templates.content:
我需要以下運鏡效果的專業英文描述，可直接用於 AI 影片生成 prompt：

運鏡類型：{{運鏡類型}}
（可選：Dolly in/out, Crane shot, Tracking shot, Whip pan, Dutch angle, Steadicam, Handheld, Zoom, Rack focus, Tilt up/down, Aerial/drone, 360 orbit）

請提供：
1. 英文運鏡描述（2-3 句，含速度和方向）
2. 適合的場景類型
3. 營造的情緒效果
4. 可搭配的轉場效果

templates.name: 影片風格參考
templates.content:
Generate a video in the style of {{風格參考}}.
（可選：Wes Anderson 對稱構圖, Christopher Nolan 時間敘事, Wong Kar-wai 霓虹色調, Ridley Scott 科幻史詩, Ghibli 手繪動畫, Pixar 3D動畫, Cyberpunk 2077, Blade Runner, 北歐極簡）

Subject: {{主題}}.
Apply the characteristic: color grading, framing, pacing, and atmosphere.
Duration: {{時長}} seconds.
Aspect ratio: {{比例}}.
